name: Electric Kaleidoscope Storm
description: Electric lightning bolts radiating from the center in a kaleidoscope symmetry pattern with 6, 8, or 12-fold symmetry. Neon cyan, magenta, and yellow bolts crack and flicker on a deep dark background. Bolts rebranch and reseed each frame for constant motion. Sparks fly randomly. Mouse rotates the kaleidoscope and changes symmetry count.
